summary: Iteration 191: Tested vendor processing bypass and batch alias resolution endpoints. All 9 backend tests passed. Endpoints correctly handle: readiness metrics, bypassed vendors list, 404 for non-existent vendor bypass, batch alias creation, empty mappings validation, and reevaluate-all.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/readiness/metrics returns valid structure with total_documents, by_status, by_action, top_blocking_reasons, etc.
GET /api/vendor-intelligence/bypassed-vendors correctly returns empty list with count=0 when no vendors are bypassed
PATCH /api/vendor-intelligence/profiles/{vendor_no}/bypass correctly returns 404 for non-existent vendor profiles
POST /api/aliases/vendors/batch-resolve creates aliases and returns proper results structure with mappings_processed, total_docs_updated, results
POST /api/aliases/vendors/batch-resolve correctly returns 400 for empty mappings
POST /api/aliases/vendors/batch-resolve correctly skips mappings with missing alias_string or vendor_no
GET /api/aliases/vendors returns aliases list with count
POST /api/readiness/reevaluate-all works without errors and returns total_processed, total_corrections, status_transitions, by_status, errors
seed_data_creation: Created test alias TEST_SC_Warehouses_191 (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 191 tested the new vendor processing bypass and batch alias resolution features. All endpoints working correctly: (1) /api/readiness/metrics returns 27 documents with status breakdown. (2) /api/vendor-intelligence/bypassed-vendors returns empty list (no vendors bypassed). (3) PATCH bypass endpoint returns 404 for non-existent vendors. (4) POST /api/aliases/vendors/batch-resolve creates aliases and returns proper results. (5) POST /api/readiness/reevaluate-all processes 27 docs with 0 errors.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/readiness/metrics - PASS (returns total_documents=27, by_status={blocked: 21, ready_auto_link: 5, ready_auto_draft: 1})
POST /api/aliases/vendors/batch-resolve - PASS (creates alias, returns mappings_processed=1, alias_created=true)
POST /api/aliases/vendors/batch-resolve (invalid) - PASS (skips mapping with missing fields)
